entities.name: GENEBANK
entities.description: Collections of large germplasm that serve as the base foundation for plant breeding and crop improvement

entities.name: GERMPLASM
entities.description: Genetic resources stored in genebanks that are challenging to manage, preserve, and assess

entities.name: PLANT BREEDING
entities.description: The process of using genetic resources to improve plant characteristics

entities.name: CROP IMPROVEMENT
entities.description: The overall goal of enhancing agricultural crops through genetic resources and breeding

entities.name: SUBSAMPLING
entities.description: The process of reducing a large germplasm collection into core and mini-core collections to reduce complexity

entities.name: CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A representative subset of a large germplasm collection used for efficient management and research

entities.name: MINI-CORE COLLECTION
entities.description: A further reduced subset of a core collection used to enhance crop improvement

entities.name: CHARACTERIZATION
entities.description: The process of describing the traits of a large gene pool in a gene bank

entities.name: EVALUATION
entities.description: The process of assessing the quality and utility of a large gene pool in a gene bank

entities.name: GENE POOL
entities.description: The total genetic diversity available within a gene bank for different crops

entities.name: BIOINFORMATICS
entities.description: The application of computational tools and software to analyze biological data for core collection development

entities.name: SOFTWARE TOOLS
entities.description: Computational applications used within bioinformatics to analyze genetic data

entities.name: GENETIC MARKERS
entities.description: Molecular tools used to identify representative accessions for the development of core collections

entities.name: HETEROZYGOSITY
entities.description: A genetic trait measuring the presence of different alleles at a locus, used in core collection development

entities.name: K-MER ANALYSIS
entities.description: A sequence analysis method used to identify representative accessions for core collections

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total variety of genetic characteristics within a population, used to develop core collections

entities.name: RELATEDNESS
entities.description: The degree of genetic similarity between accessions, used to develop core collections

entities.name: CROP
entities.description: Agricultural plants whose genetic resources are managed in genebanks for improvement
